final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing post-apocalyptic wasteland scene illustration.

Style/medium: needs a "末日废土" (post-apocalyptic wasteland) aesthetic — references in the spirit of Mad Max Fury Road vehicle design, 1970s-1980s dystopian sci-fi book cover art, S.T.A.L.K.E.R. Eastern European decay atmosphere; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include a modified armored vehicle as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: must include a desolate desert landscape with collapsed city ruins in the distance, yellowish sky, sandstorm atmosphere
Lighting/mood: needs a tense survival atmosphere with apocalyptic tension — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a yellowish, dusty direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
